<p class="key-answer" data-question="Granisetron 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Granisetron</strong> 目前有 <strong>22 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Granisetron 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Prevention of nausea and vomiting in patients receiving moderately or highly emetogenic chemotherapy, with or without cisplatin, for up to five consecutive days. Sancuso may be used in patients...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（99.6%）</li>
<li>Tourette syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>acute contagious conjunctivitis（99.5%）</li>
<li>angioedema（99.4%）</li>
<li>allergic urticaria（99.3%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（99.3%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.2%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（99.2%）</li>
<li>cold urticaria（99.1%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（99.1%）</li>
<li>punctate epithelial keratoconjunctivitis（98.3%）</li>
<li>anaphylaxis（98.2%）</li>
<li>common cold（98.0%）</li>
<li>dysentery（97.9%）</li>
<li>renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system-blocker-induced angioedema（97.9%）</li>
<li>obsessive-compulsive disorder（97.8%）</li>
<li>acquired angioedema（97.8%）</li>
<li>schizotypal personality disorder（97.7%）</li>
<li>paranoid personality disorder（97.7%）</li>
<li>schizoid personality disorder（97.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>

  border-radius: 12px;

  margin-left: 4px;
}
.news-drug-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #1565c0;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
</style>
